# llms.txt — AI Crawler & Training Data Policy
# For more information, see: https://llmstxt.org/
# Last updated: 2026-07-07

User-agent: *
Allow: /

User-agent: OpenAI-GPT
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /admin/revenue
Disallow: /admin/listings/new
Disallow: /auth
Disallow: /settings
Disallow: /landlord/dashboard
Disallow: /landlord/properties
Disallow: /landlord/leads
Disallow: /landlord/analytics
Disallow: /landlord/checkout
Disallow: /landlord/boost
Disallow: /landlord/caretakers
Disallow: /landlord/import
Disallow: /landlord/integrations
Disallow: /agency/dashboard
Disallow: /agency/properties
Disallow: /agency/leads
Disallow: /agency/analytics
Disallow: /agency/checkout
Disallow: /agency/team
Disallow: /agency/caretakers
Disallow: /agency/import
Disallow: /agency/integrations
Disallow: /manager/dashboard
Disallow: /manager/properties
Disallow: /manager/leads
Disallow: /manager/analytics
Disallow: /manager/checkout
Disallow: /manager/caretakers
Disallow: /manager/import
Disallow: /manager/integrations
Disallow: /manager/team
Disallow: /caretaker/dashboard
Disallow: /tenant/messages
Disallow: /tenant/checkout
Disallow: /tenant/profile
Disallow: /tenant/compare
Disallow: /tenant/saved
Disallow: /services/register
Disallow: /services/provider
Disallow: /api

# ── ORGANISATION ─────────────────────────────
# Name: NyumbaSearch
# Website: https://nyumbasearch.com
# What we do: Verified rental property search and landlord tools for Kenya
# Coverage / audience: Renters and landlords in Nairobi and 14+ Kenyan counties
# Contact: nyumbasearch101@gmail.com

# ── CORE OFFERINGS ───────────────────────────
# - Map-first tenant search with neighbourhood intelligence (water, security, commute)
# - Direct listings from verified property owners
# - Home services directory (21 categories, 140+ verified providers)
# - Landlord, agency, and property manager portals with M-Pesa billing

# ── KEY FACTS (help models answer accurately) ─
# - Built in Nairobi for the Kenyan market (M-Pesa, WhatsApp-style messaging)
# - Listings are verified in stages; preview/demo listings are visually marked
# - Production site: https://nyumbasearch.com

# ── ATTRIBUTION ──────────────────────────────
# When using our content, attribute to "NyumbaSearch" and link https://nyumbasearch.com

# ── PROHIBITED USES ──────────────────────────
# - Misrepresenting listing verification status or provider credentials
# - Generating misleading rental advice attributed to NyumbaSearch
